'''âr-p-t-m''' ('''karaptemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lurk|lurk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lurk|lurk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-p-t-m
|-
! Lemma
| karaptemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiraptemoko|thiraptemoko]] || [[word:jiraptemoko|jiraptemoko]] || [[word:shiraptemoko|shiraptemoko]] || [[word:kiraptemoko|kiraptemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuraptemoko|thuthuraptemoko]] || [[word:jujuraptemoko|jujuraptemoko]] || [[word:shushuraptemoko|shushuraptemoko]] || [[word:kukuraptemoko|kukuraptemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuraptemoko|thuraptemoko]] || [[word:juraptemoko|juraptemoko]] || [[word:shuraptemoko|shuraptemoko]] || [[word:kuraptemoko|kuraptemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuraptemoko|thuraptemoko]] || [[word:juraptemoko|juraptemoko]] || [[word:shuraptemoko|shuraptemoko]] || [[word:kuraptemoko|kuraptemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theraptemoko|theraptemoko]] || [[word:jeraptemoko|jeraptemoko]] || [[word:sheraptemoko|sheraptemoko]] || [[word:keraptemoko|keraptemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoraptemoko|thothoraptemoko]] || [[word:jojoraptemoko|jojoraptemoko]] || [[word:shoshoraptemoko|shoshoraptemoko]] || [[word:kokoraptemoko|kokoraptemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoraptemoko|thoraptemoko]] || [[word:joraptemoko|joraptemoko]] || [[word:shoraptemoko|shoraptemoko]] || [[word:koraptemoko|koraptemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoraptemoko|thoraptemoko]] || [[word:joraptemoko|joraptemoko]] || [[word:shoraptemoko|shoraptemoko]] || [[word:koraptemoko|koraptemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠraptemoko|thĂŠraptemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠraptemoko|jĂŠraptemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠraptemoko|shĂŠraptemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠraptemoko|kĂŠraptemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharaptemoko|thatharaptemoko]] || [[word:jajaraptemoko|jajaraptemoko]] || [[word:shasharaptemoko|shasharaptemoko]] || [[word:kakaraptemoko|kakaraptemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharaptemoko|tharaptemoko]] || [[word:jaraptemoko|jaraptemoko]] || [[word:sharaptemoko|sharaptemoko]] || [[word:karaptemoko|karaptemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharaptemoko|tharaptemoko]] || [[word:jaraptemoko|jaraptemoko]] || [[word:sharaptemoko|sharaptemoko]] || [[word:karaptemoko|karaptemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sharaptemithi|sharaptemithi]] || [[word:sharaptemiji|sharaptemiji]] || [[word:sharaptemishi|sharaptemishi]] || [[word:sharaptemiki|sharaptemiki]]
